wiki.content: "404 (New Era)" is the title track from South Korean girl group KiiiKiii’s second mini‑album "Delulu Pack", released on January 26, 2026 through STARSHIP Entertainment. The song serves as the flagship moment of the 'Delulu Pack' era, a creative expression of the group’s distinctive blend of youthful confidence, genre exploration, and Gen Z‑infused musical identity. Musically, “404 (New Era)” draws on upbeat UK house and garage rhythms, pairing an infectious dance groove with dynamic rap verses and melodic vocals to create a bold, club‑ready sound. The production layers punchy beats, lively basslines, and layered harmonies that mirror the track’s energetic spirit, marking a fresh sonic chapter for KiiiKiii as they move beyond the soundscapes of their earlier releases. Lyrically and conceptually, the song plays with the familiar internet error code “404 Not Found,” reimagining it as a symbol of freedom that exists without fixed coordinates. Instead of representing something “missing,” KiiiKiii flips the idea into a message about forging one’s own path, embracing individuality, creativity, and a “new era” of self‑authored direction. The accompanying music video visualizes this theme by blending whimsical, surreal imagery with candid moments of the members’ youthful fantasies becoming real. Scenes shift between playful childhood memories and bold fashion‑forward sequences, symbolizing how imagination and self‑identity converge in KiiiKiii’s creative universe. “404 (New Era)” has been praised for its genre‑blurring house‑influenced sound and vibrant energy, showcasing KiiiKiii’s ability to navigate and reinterpret club music styles within the context of contemporary K‑pop. Critics and fans have highlighted its fresh groove, fast‑talking rap sections, and vivid choreography as standout elements that set the track apart. As part of Delulu Pack, the song sits alongside B‑sides like “Delulu,” “UNDERDOGS,” “MUNGNYANG,” “Dizzy,” and “To Me From Me (Prod. TABLO),” forming a collection that spans disco, house, bass‑driven sounds, hip‑hop, and retro pop influences. The EP reflects KiiiKiii’s commitment to musical experimentation and creative expansion. Overall, “404 (New Era)” stands as a defining statement in KiiiKiii’s discography, a vibrant, dance‑infused anthem that captures the group’s vision of living boldly, freely, and on their own terms, signaling a bright and confident “new era” for the group.
